title: 1985 Horsetooth Mini Classic, Boys 10 - 11, Overall Awards Ceremony

enrichment.summary: Awards ceremony for the 1985 Horsetooth Mini Classic Boys 10-11 age group, announcing third, second, and first place overall finishers along with participant awards.
enrichment.speaker: other

claims.subject: John Wayne
claims.claim: John Wayne has a connection to Derry Queen.

claims.subject: Eric
claims.claim: Eric wins a bridge top and here one in force.

claims.subject: cycling balls
claims.claim: Cycling balls from the bike broker are noteworthy.

claims.subject: Ray Brown
claims.claim: Ray Brown is the first place winner overall, right or number nine.

claims.subject: racing seats
claims.claim: The first place winner receives a set of racing seats from the bike broker.

claims.subject: participants
claims.claim: Participant awards are given for the 10, 9 year old boys.

claims.subject: John Rick
claims.claim: John Rick is a participant award winner.

claims.subject: R.J.R. Jeremy Newlin
claims.claim: R.J.R. Jeremy Newlin is a participant award winner.

claims.subject: Jonathan Podbore
claims.claim: Jonathan Podbore is a participant award winner.

claims.subject: Brandon Riding
claims.claim: Brandon Riding is a participant award winner.
